title: Protocol for determining the contribution of protein and RNA components to condensate organization by the permeabilization and enzyme treatment of live U-2 OS cells
author: Parker, Dylan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the scripts associated with the Star Protocols publication, "Protocol for determining the contribution of protein and RNA components to condensate organization by the permeabilization and enzyme treatment of live U-2 OS cells."
